reasoning: XLE +0.48% while XLK +0.11% and XLF -0.28% = classic risk-off/defensive rotation. Energy outperforming growth sectors; tech NOT leading on the overnight gap up. XLF: -0.28% — financials slightly negative. Yield curve or banking stress signal.
